creator: lippemail@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

Your port is unfetchable, as described below:

http://www.goodking.ca/tb/errors/7-lippe/free-sa-devel-2.0.0b2.log

The correct URL would be:

http://ufpr.dl.sourceforge.net/project/free-sa/free-sa-dev/2.0.0b2%20_Big%20Change%20Edition_/free-sa-2.0.0b2.tar.gz

Try to fix it and send a patch again, thank you!

-- 
Felippe de Meirelles Motta
